name: wheel-picker
title: Wheel Picker
description: iOS-style wheel picker for Svelte 5 with inertia scrolling, infinite loop, and keyboard navigation.

files.content:
{#if infinite} {#each [...options].reverse() as option, g} {@const scale = cylindrical ? cylindricalScaleY(g - options.length, physics.offset, optionItemHeight, visibleCount) : undefined}
{option.label}
{/each} {/if} {#each options as option, i} {@const scale = cylindrical ? cylindricalScaleY(i, physics.offset, optionItemHeight, visibleCount) : undefined}
{option.label}
{/each} {#if infinite} {#each options as option, j} {@const scale = cylindrical ? cylindricalScaleY(options.length + j, physics.offset, optionItemHeight, visibleCount) : undefined}
{option.label}
{/each} {/if}
{@render children?.()}
